content.text: How can I correctly serialize a LocateRequestPayload object into an output buffer while adhering to different KMIP version specifications?
If I attempt to serialize this payload using KMIP Version 2.0 without any defined attributes, does it fail gracefully?
No, if the payload is encoded for KMIP 2.0+ but lacks attributes, it will intentionally raise an exceptions.InvalidField.
That clarifies how required fields are handled during serialization.
